Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Wei Mon Teris]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Unsouled ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 2''' — Teris is a Copper stage Enforcer.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 2''' — Teris is a Copper-stage sacred artist.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 2''' — Teris uses Copper madra to bolster his strength, toughness, and speed.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 2''' — Teris's full name is Wei Mon Teris.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 3''' — Wei Mon Teris wears snowfox skin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 3''' — Teris is Lindon's cousin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 3''' — Teris was punished by the First Elder with a withheld stipend, isolated meditation, and three whippings.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 5''' — Wei Mon Teris is a member of the Mon family.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 11''' — Teris betrayed Lindon and Yerin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 11''' — Teris is a year younger than Lindon.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
